title: Oil prices rise as Trump says Iran let 10 tankers through Strait of Hormuz as a 'present'
summary_full: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.
